description_long: This shotgun features a modern, tactical design with a matte black and metallic gray finish. The body is robust, with a prominent rectangular receiver and a long, cylindrical barrel fitted with a suppressor or muzzle device. The stock is solid and angular, providing stability, and the grip is ergonomic with a pronounced trigger guard. A large, detachable box magazine is visible beneath the receiver, indicating a high-capacity, magazine-fed configuration. The top of the receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and the overall build suggests a semi-automatic action suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a matte black and metallic gray finish, featuring a box magazine, suppressor, and full-length rail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the suppressor, box magazine, and angular stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the cylindrical barrel and suppressor, with the stock and magazine mostly obscured.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the receiver, magazine, and stock, mirroring the details of view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the grip and trigger guard visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a cylindrical suppressor or muzzle device; no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
